title: Reinforcement Learning Agent Obstacle Avoidance Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical decision-making process a reinforcement learning agent uses to navigate an environment while avoiding obstacles.
elements: Reward Signal (Positive for progress, Negative for collision)
relationships: Based on state and policy, Agent selects an Action
Action is executed in the Environment
Environment provides a Reward and new Updated State
Agent updates its policy based on the reward received
